evals.prompt: /elite-next:ui-update "bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-700" — change this to bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-700
evals.expected_output: Finds all 3 usages, proposes centralizing into a shared styles.ts constant since it appears in 3+ places with no constant yet, shows a plan, and waits for confirmation before editing.
expectations: Finds the pattern in all three files: ApprovalBadge.tsx, NotificationBell.tsx (inside colorFor), and ShippingCostsCard.tsx
Since there is no shared styles.ts constant yet and the pattern appears 3+ times, proposes adding one before editing individual files
Shows a plan (## UI Update Plan) listing the files to update
Asks 'Does this plan look right? Shall I proceed?' and waits rather than editing immediately
Does not stop after Step 1 without ever proposing centralization

evals.prompt: /elite-next:ui-update "rounded px-2" — remove this, we don't need rounded corners on these badges anymore
evals.expected_output: Finds usages of a much more generic-looking string and correctly handles the ambiguity/scope rather than blindly stripping it from unrelated elements.
expectations: Finds the occurrences of 'rounded px-2' across the fixture files
Shows a plan before editing and asks for confirmation
Does not silently skip verifying afterward — the skill's Step 5 requires a final search for the old pattern before declaring completion
